name: Claude Flow
description: Orchestrates multi-agent swarms for Claude Code — 100+ specialized agents, shared memory, and consensus topologies via CLI and MCP. By ruvnet (formerly claude-flow, now ruflo).

skills.name: Agent Swarm Orchestration
skills.description: Spawns and coordinates 100+ specialized agents on top of Claude Code for parallel task execution.

skills.name: Shared Memory
skills.description: Maintains a shared memory layer so swarm agents pass context and results between each other.

skills.name: Consensus Topologies
skills.description: Arranges agents in configurable topologies with consensus mechanisms for reliable multi-agent decisions.
